subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Hearken unto My call, then detach thyself from all else save Me, and drink thou from the chalice of My praise from the fingers of My mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی اسمعی ندائی ثم انقطعی عن سوائی ثم اشربی کاس ثنائی من انامل رحمتی و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power of prayer, @presence of; reunion with God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation
